message:
chore: remove orphaned watch_leak_test.rs (no mod declaration, unreachable)

src/channel/watch_leak_test.rs was a 54-line standalone test file that had
no corresponding mod declaration anywhere in the channel module tree, making
it completely unreachable by both cargo test and cargo check. The test logic
(watch channel leak detection via Arc strong_count) is already covered by
the existing watch channel test suite in src/channel/watch.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
